    • Introduction to GenoSim: Forward-Time Genotype Simulation

Simulate Genotype Data Constrained by a Real Family Pedigree and VCF

Source: R/pedigree_sim.R
simulate_from_pedigree.Rd

Simulate Genotype Data Constrained by a Real Family Pedigree and VCF

simulate_from_pedigree(
  vcf_cohort,
  pedigree,
  extra_generations = 3L,
  mut_rate = 1e-04,
  selection_s = 0,
  n_offspring_per_couple = 3L,
  n_eff = NULL,
  match_by = "individual_id",
  reference_population = NULL,
  population = NULL,
  ancestral_af = NULL,
  seed = 42L,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

vcf_cohort

List containing geno_matrix and snp_map

pedigree

data.frame with columns individual_id, father_id, mother_id, generation, inbreeding_F

extra_generations

Integer \([0,10]\)

mut_rate

Numeric mutation rate per generation

selection_s

Numeric selection coefficient

n_offspring_per_couple

Integer

n_eff

Effective population size (or NULL)

match_by

Column name for matching VCF IDs

reference_population

NULL, vector, data.frame, or file path

population

Character (e.g., "SAS") for Balding‑Nichols

ancestral_af

Ancestral frequencies for BN model

seed

Random seed

verbose

Logical

Value

List with genotypes, pedigree, snp_map, allele_freqs, summary_stats, haplotypes, log, params

Contents

Developed by GenoSim Abu Bakar.
